data.text/markdown:
AddBiomechanics Explorer

Explore human movement data from the AddBiomechanics dataset using SQL. Data was ingested from .b3d files into Parquet bundles using MoveDB.

Subject P010_split0 — female, 21y, 54.0kg, 1.656m
Skeleton 37 DOFs
Trials 34 total (30 walking)
Tables subjects, trials, kinematics_summary, gait_trajectories
Query Builder

data.text/html: <marimo-ui-element object-id='lEQa-0' random-id='d63d997f-47f5-87f7-7564-97edf4982bc7'><marimo-dropdown data-initial-value='["kinematics_summary"]' data-label='"\u003cspan class=\"markdown prose dark:prose-invert contents\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"paragraph\"\u003eTable\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e"' data-options='["subjects","trials","kinematics_summary","gait_trajectories"]' data-allow-select-none='false' data-searchable='false' data-full-width='false' data-disabled='false'></marimo-dropdown></marimo-ui-element>

<marimo-ui-element object-id='Xref-0' random-id='c30c7ab8-98fa-27be-9d3a-024a7ea4c6c7'><marimo-text-area data-initial-value='"SELECT * FROM read_parquet('data/kinematics_summary.parquet')\nWHERE dof_name IN ('knee_angle_l', 'knee_angle_r')\nORDER BY trial_name, dof_name"' data-label='"\u003cspan class=\"markdown prose dark:prose-invert contents\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"paragraph\"\u003eSQL\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e"' data-placeholder='""' data-disabled='false' data-debounce='true' data-full-width='false' data-rows='10'></marimo-text-area></marimo-ui-element>

<marimo-ui-element object-id='SFPL-0' random-id='2d49ee78-e0ca-efb1-d398-aadf1ed38699'><marimo-button data-initial-value='0' data-label='"\u003cspan class=\"markdown prose dark:prose-invert contents\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"paragraph\"\u003eRun query\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e"' data-kind='"neutral"' data-disabled='false' data-full-width='false'></marimo-button></marimo-ui-element>

data.text/markdown: Gait Trajectories

data.text/html: <marimo-ui-element object-id='Kclp-0' random-id='9a7818ec-fa54-06a8-bf2b-5fdfaf7b38d1'><marimo-multiselect data-initial-value='["knee_angle_l","knee_angle_r","hip_flexion_l","hip_flexion_r"]' data-label='"\u003cspan class=\"markdown prose dark:prose-invert contents\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"paragraph\"\u003eSelect DOFs\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e"' data-options='["ankle_angle_l","ankle_angle_r","arm_add_l","arm_add_r","arm_flex_l","arm_flex_r","arm_rot_l","arm_rot_r","elbow_flex_l","elbow_flex_r","hip_adduction_l","hip_adduction_r","hip_flexion_l","hip_flexion_r","hip_rotation_l","hip_rotation_r","knee_angle_l","knee_angle_r","lumbar_bending","lumbar_extension","lumbar_rotation","mtp_angle_l","mtp_angle_r","pelvis_list","pelvis_rotation","pelvis_tilt","pelvis_tx","pelvis_ty","pelvis_tz","pro_sup_l","pro_sup_r","subtalar_angle_l","subtalar_angle_r","wrist_dev_l","wrist_dev_r","wrist_flex_l","wrist_flex_r"]' data-full-width='false' data-disabled='false'></marimo-multiselect></marimo-ui-element>

<marimo-ui-element object-id='emfo-0' random-id='7f3616c9-3f07-786f-9c9d-ee92c19fd445'><marimo-switch data-initial-value='false' data-label='"\u003cspan class=\"markdown prose dark:prose-invert contents\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"paragraph\"\u003eShow mean ± std across strides\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e"' data-disabled='false'></marimo-switch></marimo-ui-element>
